---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2021 - 2026

# Work Experience

1.Worked as a kitchen assistant in Maine , U.S. with Work and Travel Program 

## Employements

1.  None

## Internships

1.  Teleperformance , HR Payroll Intern , 2023

2.  ASSAN, Quality Control Intern , 2025

3.  TOFAŞ, Long Term Intern , 2026

# Projects

1.Optimization of Production Scheduling in Industrial Kİtchen Equipment Project for EMU405 Final Project

2.Akbank Vaka Maratonu

\# Competencies

R, Quarto, Git, Python

# Hobbies

1.Basketball

2.Reading a book

# CV

You can access my CV below:

[Download my CV](CV_files/ardatuyluoglu_cv.pdf)
